ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crimes" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the crime occurred */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the crime occurred */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the crime data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the crime data */,
  "rape" INTEGER /* Number of reported rape cases */,
  "kidnapping_and_abduction" INTEGER /* Number of reported kidnapping and abduction cases */,
  "dowry_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of reported dowry deaths */,
  "assault_on_women" INTEGER /* Number of reported assault on women cases */,
  "insult_to_modesty" INTEGER /* Number of reported insults to modesty cases */,
  "cruelty_by_husband_or_relatives" INTEGER /* Number of reported cruelty by husband or relatives cases */,
  "importation_of_girls" INTEGER /* Number of reported importation of girls cases */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases for all types of crimes */,
  "source_of_data" TEXT /* Source of the crime data */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the crime data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state or union territory */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state or union territory */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state or union territory */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state or union territory */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the state or union territory in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "state_population_density" REAL /* Population density of the state */,
  "state_crime_rate" REAL /* Overall crime rate for the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state or union territory where the district is located */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the district */,
  "district_population_density" REAL /* Population density of the district */,
  "district_crime_rate" REAL /* Overall crime rate for the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the crime */,
  "legal_penalty" TEXT /* Typical legal penalty for the crime */,
  "prevalence" TEXT /* Prevalence rate of the crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime record */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the crime occurred */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the crime report */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the crime report */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of crime */,
  "case_number" TEXT /* Case number assigned to the crime */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the crime was reported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the crime case (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the crime */,
  "victim_age" INTEGER /* Age of the victim */,
  "victim_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the victim */,
  "victim_occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the victim */,
  "perpetrator_age" INTEGER /* Age of the perpetrator */,
  "perpetrator_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the perpetrator */,
  "perpetrator_occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the perpetrator */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location where the crime occurred */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day when the crime occurred */,
  "evidence_collected" TEXT /* Details of evidence collected */,
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investigator assigned to the case */,
  "investigation_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the investigation started */,
  "investigation_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the investigation concluded */,
  "case_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the case in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_records_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES crime_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_records_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_records_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "status_color" TEXT /* Color code for the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data entry personnel, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the record */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES crime_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime record that was modified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to perform the action */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the modified field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the modified field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES crime_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime trend */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the trend is observed */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the trend is observed */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of crime */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the trend analysis */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the trend analysis */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "trend_data" TEXT /* JSON object containing trend data (e.g., yearly crime counts) */,
  "trend_source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data */,
  "trend_confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_trends_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_trends_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_trends_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)
